---
title: "Advanced Topics"
---

## What Lives Here

The advanced track is where the site moves into:

- real analysis
- optimization
- numerical methods
- matrix analysis
- learning theory
- high-dimensional probability
- high-dimensional statistics

## First Live Module

- [Optimization](optimization/index.qmd)

Optimization is the first advanced module now starting to go live. It is the natural bridge from the foundation stack into convexity, duality, certificates, first-order methods, and research-facing mathematical modeling.

## Planned Next Advanced Modules

- `Real Analysis`
- `Numerical Methods`
- `Matrix Analysis`
- `Learning Theory`
- `High-Dimensional Probability`
- `High-Dimensional Statistics`
